question: Create a `Movie` class with `title` (string), `director` (string), and `releaseYear` (int). Implement a constructor where `director` and `releaseYear` have default values (e.g., 'Unknown' and 2000), allowing movies to be created with just a title.

test_cases.expected:
Movie 1 Details:
Title: Inception, Director: Christopher Nolan, Release Year: 2010

Movie 2 Details:
Title: Dune, Director: Unknown, Release Year: 2000

Movie 3 Details:
Title: Pulp Fiction, Director: Quentin Tarantino, Release Year: 2000
